PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Aug-02-2017 Continued To Aug-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the Attorney of Record is different from the Attorney who appears on the pleadings and that a Substitution of Attorney has not been filed. An Order to Appear will be issued to Executor Malcolm Post, Attorney Kristen Bargmeyer and Attorney Peter Tamases to appear on August 30, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they failed to respond to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition to Terminate Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
